title: Get Results
description: Retrieve scraped PAP.fr property listings with details, energy ratings, and contact information

content.introduction: Retrieve property listings scraped from PAP.fr search results. Each result contains comprehensive property details including price, location coordinates, energy performance ratings (DPE), greenhouse gas emissions (GES), and direct contact information from private sellers.

resultFields.title: Result Fields
resultFields.content: Each result object contains the following property listing data:

fields.description: Unique identifier for this result record
Object type, always "result"
Hash ID of the squid that produced this result
Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped
Headline or title of the listing
Listing price in the specified currency
Currency unit for the price field
Total number of rooms (living spaces)
Number of bedrooms
Property size or land area in square meters
Neighborhood or postal area
Latitude coordinate of the property
Longitude coordinate of the property
Full textual description of the property
Energy performance rating (DPE: A-G)
Greenhouse gas emissions rating (A-G)
Contact phone number for inquiries
Comma-separated list of listing image URLs
Direct URL to the listing on PAP
ISO date when the listing was published
Internal reference code for the listing
PAP's internal ID for this publication
Navigation path or category breadcrumb
ISO timestamp when the listing was fetched
Native numeric ID matching the listing
Reserved for function-specific metadata

energyRatings.title: Energy & GES Ratings
energyRatings.content: French properties include mandatory energy performance diagnostics (DPE) and greenhouse gas emissions (GES) ratings, scaled from A (best) to G (worst). These are valuable for filtering eco-friendly properties.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.content: Results are paginated. Use the `next` and `previous` URLs in the response to navigate through pages, or use `page` and `page_size` query parameters.

parameters.name: squid
parameters.description: The squid hash ID to get results from

parameters.name: run
parameters.description: Filter results by specific run hash ID

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 100, max: 1000)

proTips.content: Use the energy and ges fields to filter for energy-efficient properties. Ratings A-C are considered good, while D-G indicate higher energy consumption.
Phone numbers are direct contacts to private sellers. French mobile numbers start with 06 or 07.

seo.title: Get Results - PAP Search Export - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Retrieve scraped PAP.fr property listings including price, energy ratings, location coordinates, and direct seller contact information.
